chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 647 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondent No.3/University Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel appearing for Respondent No.3 / University submits that every month the petitioner is being paid rupees one million, out of the total Commutation amount of Rs.8,457,176/- and so far as three million have been given to the petitioner. Further every month the installment of same amount would be given to the petitioner i.e. one million in terms of order dated 16.05.2023. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner; however, in the light of above, this petition is disposed of with direction hat after full payments compliance report to be submitted for perusal in Chamber. Judge Judge ARBROHI
